description: Controls deterministic record/replay behaviors, and manages replayable recordings and sessions.

types.description: The position of a recording in a session.
The index and timestamp of an input action.

properties.name: dateCreated
properties.description: Creation time of recording, in milliseconds since the epoch.

types.description: A replay recording serialized to JSON.

properties.name: dateCreated
properties.description: Creation time of session, in milliseconds since the epoch.

types.description: A series of replay recording identifiers representing a capture session.

commands.name: startCapture
commands.description: Starts capture of a program execution.

commands.name: stopCapture
commands.description: Stops capture of a program execution.

commands.name: replayUpToLocation
commands.description: Replays the program up to a specific location. The command will bring the replay execution up to the point before the first input in the specified recording with the specified mark is used.

commands.name: pausePlayback
commands.description: Pauses the current replay action. Can be resumed by using a replay command.

commands.name: stopPlayback
commands.description: Stops the current playback. Further replaying will start from the beginning. Optionally, unlock user input.

commands.name: setPauseOnError
commands.description: Changes the actions taken by the replay backend when a playback error is encountered.

commands.name: loadSession
commands.description: Unloads the currently loaded capture session and loads the specified session

commands.name: addRecordingToSession
commands.description: Adds the specified recording to the given session at the given position.

commands.name: removeRecordingFromSession
commands.description: Removes the recording at the given position from the specified session.

commands.name: getSerializedSession
commands.description: Returns the specified session serialized to a JSON object.

commands.name: getAvailableSessions
commands.description: Returns sessionIds for all available sessions.

commands.name: getSerializedRecording
commands.description: Returns the recording serialized to a JSON object.

commands.name: getAvailableRecordings
commands.description: Returns recordingIds for all available recordings.

events.name: captureStarted
events.description: Fired when capture has started.

events.name: captureStopped
events.description: Fired when capture has stopped.

events.name: capturedInput
events.description: A new (event loop) input was captured.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Data for the captured (event loop) input.

events.name: playbackHitLocation
events.description: A mark was reached during replay of a recording.

parameters.name: recordingIndex
parameters.description: The position of the recording in which a mark was hit in the currently loaded capture session.

events.name: playbackStarted
events.description: Fired when replaying has started.

events.name: playbackPaused
events.description: Fired when replaying has paused, but not finished.

parameters.name: recordingIndex
parameters.description: The position of the recording in which replaying has paused in the currently loaded capture session.

parameters.name: mark
parameters.description: The mark of the input at which we paused, but has not yet been executed.

events.name: playbackFinished
events.description: Fired when replaying has stopped.

events.name: playbackError
events.description: Fired when playback encounters an internal (divergence) error.

parameters.name: isFatal
parameters.description: Whether the error causes immediate abortion of replay state.

events.name: inputLocked
events.description: Fired when user input has become locked (will be ignored).

events.name: inputUnlocked
events.description: Fired when user input has been unlocked (will no longer be ignored).

events.name: sessionCreated
events.description: Fired when a new session is created or found on the filesystem.

events.name: sessionRemoved
events.description: Fired when a session is removed and can no longer be loaded.

events.name: sessionLoaded
events.description: Fired when a session is loaded.

events.name: recordingCreated
events.description: Fired when a new recording is created or found on the filesystem.

events.name: recordingRemoved
events.description: Fired when a recording is removed and can no longer be replayed as part of a session.

events.name: recordingClosed
events.description: Fired when a recording is completed and can no longer have inputs added to it.

events.name: recordingAddedToSession
events.description: Fired when a recording is inserted into a capture session.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: Id for the session the recording was added to.

parameters.name: recordingIndex
parameters.description: Index of the added recording in the capture session.

events.name: recordingRemovedFromSession
events.description: Fired when a recording is removed from a capture session.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: Id for the session the recording was added to.

parameters.name: recordingIndex
parameters.description: Index of the removed recording in the capture session.

events.name: recordingLoaded
events.description: Fired when a recording is loaded.

events.name: recordingUnloaded
events.description: Fired when a recording is unloaded.
